case_title: DEIRDRE DIGRANDE ET AL VS. DELTA AIR LINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 25.00- SERVED DEC-24-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,369.91 FILED BY DIGRANDE, DEIRDRE SPILLANE, ROSEMARIE AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-19-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF ROSEMARIE SPILLANE WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PER PLAINTIFF, CASE SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-14-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF DEIRDRE DIGRANDE WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF ROSEMARIE SPILLANE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. DEIRDRE DIGRANDE REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT CALLING, THEN DISMISS THE MATTER. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 3/19/15. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
